title: Final Pilot: improve portfolio insight confidence legend clarity
problem: Confidence legend in insight card is not explicit enough for first-pass interpretation.
evidence: benchmark fintech pattern requires explicit confidence semantics
proposed_change: Update confidence legend wording and helper line in PublicPortfolioView insight card.
expected_benefit: Higher clarity and trust during insight interpretation.
kpi_target: Target KPI: measurable improvement with before/after threshold.
benchmark_delta: Benchmark delta: explicit gap to best-practice pattern and how this change narrows it.
